prompt: An overhead anime illustration of {argument name="character name" default="Anna Yanami"} lying on her back on a {argument name="setting" default="classroom desk"}. She has messy {argument name="hair color" default="blue"} hair with an ahoge, and bright blue eyes. She is {argument name="expression" default="smiling happily with a slight blush"} and {argument name="pose" default="holding up both hands in peace signs"}. She wears a white short-sleeved school shirt decorated with four bows down the front in alternating colors of dark blue, light blue, and yellow, paired with a light blue pleated skirt featuring a white stripe near the hem. The scene is lit by warm afternoon sunlight casting distinct shadows across the desk and her body, with a wooden floor visible in the background.
translatedPrompt: 一张 {argument name="character name" default="Anna Yanami"} 仰卧在 {argument name="setting" default="教室课桌"} 上的俯视动漫插画。她留着凌乱的 {argument name="hair color" default="蓝色"} 头发，头顶有一根呆毛，有着明亮的蓝色眼睛。她 {argument name="expression" default="面带红晕，笑得很开心"}，并且 {argument name="pose" default="双手比出剪刀手"}。她穿着一件白色短袖校服衬衫，前襟装饰着四个交替颜色的蝴蝶结（深蓝色、浅蓝色和黄色），搭配一条下摆带有白条纹的浅蓝色百褶裙。场景在温暖的午后阳光照射下，在课桌和她的身体上投射出明显的阴影，背景中可以看到木质地板。

breakdown.creativeCore: 俯视视角动漫少女比耶肖像：生成一张动漫少女趴在桌子上比耶的俯视插画，非常适合用于角色同人创作。
breakdown.subject: 人物
breakdown.bestUse: 游戏角色、IP 形象、Cosplay、职业角色设定

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 人物/角色 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[景别/角度/版式层级/主体位置]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: anime]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
[是否含文字/精确文字/可读性要求]。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
